resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACTN3 rs1815739 CT call is available. This is educational trait context only and does not diagnose musculoskeletal disease, estimate injury risk, explain pain, infer bone density, or provide exercise clearance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACTN3 is discussed in fitness research, but musculoskeletal health depends on many genetic and non-genetic factors, including training history, symptoms, injuries, medical history, and clinical assessment.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACE ID context row is available. This is not enough to diagnose arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, pain causes, imaging findings, lab findings, injury risk, or treatment needs.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACE can provide limited fitness-trait context, but it does not determine joint, tendon, bone, pain, imaging, lab, or treatment outcomes.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: No calibrated musculoskeletal score, injury-risk model, pain model, arthritis model, EDS model, osteoporosis model, bone-density evidence, imaging evidence, lab evidence, exercise-clearance context, treatment context, or ancestry applicability metadata is supplied with this fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: NHGRI polygenic risk scores / GWAS Catalog
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can describe supplied marker context, but it should not make musculoskeletal health, diagnosis, treatment, injury, pain, bone-density, imaging, lab, or exercise-clearance conclusions without validated evidence.

musculoskeletalContext: Use this report as educational marker context, not as a diagnosis or treatment plan.
Evaluate symptoms, injuries, imaging, labs, training history, and medical history with qualified professionals when relevant.
Do not use genotype alone for exercise clearance, injury-risk estimates, pain explanations, arthritis interpretation, EDS interpretation, osteoporosis interpretation, or treatment decisions.

references.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores

missingInputs: Authenticated sample-report sections and rows have not been extracted.
No calibrated musculoskeletal, injury-risk, pain, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, bone-density, imaging, lab, exercise-clearance, treatment, or ancestry-applicability model is supplied.
No symptoms, injury history, training history, physical exam, imaging, laboratory testing, family history, clinician assessment, or treatment history is supplied.
uncertainty: Musculoskeletal health is influenced by genetics, training, injury history, age, nutrition, sleep, medical history, environment, and many other factors.
A small number of markers cannot explain pain, injury risk, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, bone density, imaging results, lab results, or treatment needs.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not diagnose musculoskeletal disease, estimate injury risk, explain pain, infer arthritis, infer EDS, infer osteoporosis, infer bone density, interpret imaging, interpret labs, recommend treatment, prescribe exercise, or provide exercise clearance.
